creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, I'm going to test the update soon.

I'd like to extrapolate the pjsua part for now it will require a little time to discover why it's not working.

Anyway I'll take a look at that too while testing the update.

I confess I made the pjsip port just because it was required by asterisk13, and did not check the pjsua part.
